problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling may resolve How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
